name: progressTrack
invariants: output.ok === false || (Array.isArray(output.result.details) && output.result.details.every(d => Number.isFinite(d.completionPct) && d.completionPct <= 100 && typeof d.complete === 'boolean'))
_note: education.progressTrack is a LENS_ACTIONS handler (registerLensAction('education','progressTrack',...)) reached via /api/lens/run (artifact.data === unwrapped input). DETERMINISTIC pure compute. Returns program/cert completion — overallCompletionPct, totalRequirements, completedRequirements, remainingRequirements, estimatedCompletionDate, details[].{requirementId,name,completionPct,complete}. The component + inline page panel render these EXACT fields. POISON: requiredUnits/completedUnits coerced via eduFinite + clamped — non-finite collapse to a finite fallback, completed clamped to [0,required], requiredUnits floored at 0.0001 so completionPct can never exceed 100 nor be NaN; a non-array requirements throws → caught {ok:false,error:'handler_error'}. Pinned by server/tests/education-lens-macros.test.js.
